patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old female (DOB documented as 05/05/1952 in multiple records, with alternate DOB entries noted), has documented diagnoses including Mixed dyslipidemia, Essential hypertension, Postoperative/unspecified anemia, and Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Significant laboratory findings include elevated ferritin (266.8 ng/mL, 07/03/2023), low iron (41 ug/dL, 07/03/2023), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 mL/min/1.73m2 (07/03/2023), and triglycerides 158 mg/dL (07/03/2023). A colonoscopy with biopsy was scheduled/performed on 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Functional assessments document difficulty walking; dressing/bathing status is inconsistent across encounters. Multiple care teams are involved, including Hand HA MD (PCP) and several specialists in cardiology, endocrinology, and pulmonary medicine. Recent vital: BP 128/78 (01/11/2025). Multiple social history entries record prior tobacco use and current alcohol non-use. Conflicting demographic and social-history items are preserved in conflicts for reconciliation.
